response.justification: While Maria demonstrates strong technical breadth (19+ years across required languages) and production experience at scale (millions of requests/second, high-availability systems), the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, metrics instrumentation, or measurement infrastructure—the core focus of this Principal role. The gap is not in seniority but in specialized domain expertise. Recent positions show individual-contributor or small-team scope rather than Principal-level cross-team architecture leadership.
strengths: Extensive technical breadth across required stack (JavaScript/TypeScript, C, C++, C#, Java) with proven production-scale experience (Dunnhumby: millions of HTTP requests/sec; Optilyz: millions of automated mail transactions)

Strong technical leadership and knowledge-sharing demonstrated through workshops, open-source projects (GISCollective, Trial test runner), mentoring, and ability to learn new domains (took over iOS development at WatchUp)
Deep full-stack expertise including infrastructure, DevOps, CI/CD setup, and hands-on coding across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
concerns: No demonstrated experience building experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, or rollout automation—core responsibilities of this Principal role

Limited evidence of metrics infrastructure, telemetry design, statistical analysis, or data science collaboration despite scale experience; Optilyz pricing work doesn't clarify measurement platform contributions

Recent roles (Optilyz, re:cinq) show individual-contributor scope; no evidence of leading Principal-level cross-team initiatives around growth systems, measurement architecture, or decision infrastructure across products

key_factors.factor: Production systems at scale and technical breadth
